title: Pass 5.C.2: ferrotorch-distributions TransformedDistribution::entropy not-implemented
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-distributions audit, STUB.

src/transforms.rs:507-521 — TransformedDistribution::entropy returns InvalidArgument 'not implemented for the general case'; no per-transform entropy delegation even when a closed form exists (e.g., AffineTransform of a Normal yields Normal entropy + ln|scale|).

Acceptance:
- Add a Transform::log_abs_det_jacobian-aware delegation: entropy(transformed) = entropy(base) + E[log|det J|]
- Cover Affine, Exp, Sigmoid transforms with closed-form entropy first; Err with clear message for transforms where E[log|det J|] is intractable
- Discriminating fixture against scipy / torch.distributions.
